label: Combat OS — Tactical Operator (UFC Gym Dublin)
summary: Build strength that carries into hard rounds without draining the sport training that matters most.
outcomes: Develop full-body strength without grinding repetitions
Build resilient hips, trunk and shoulders around a flexible week
description: A minimalist strength-led programme for a lean, advanced striker (30yo, 67kg) training around 3 weekly fight sessions. Priorities: relative strength, then conditioning/skill (covered by fight days), then explosiveness. Longevity-first: RPE-capped loads, no grinding, single-leg and anti-rotation work for joint health, no deadlift. Full-body x3 so a missed day never skips a movement pattern. PHASE 2 of the plan — graduate into this after the Foundation block (combatos-foundation-2026).

days.label: Day 1 — S&C: Lower + Posterior
days.focus: Squat strength, hip power, single-leg balance

items.name: Barbell Back Squat
items.cue: Explosive drive out of the hole; leave ~2 reps in reserve. Your signature lift — keep every rep pristine.

items.name: Single-Leg Glute Machine (kickback)
items.cue: Elbows supported, full extension, hard squeeze. Your no-deadlift hip-extension anchor (punch/kick power) plus pelvic stability.

items.name: Bulgarian Split Squat (DB)
items.cue: Own the balance. Corrects asymmetry directly — fighting is single-leg-dominant.

items.name: Rotational Med-Ball Throw (astro)
items.cue: Max intent, hip-to-fist. POWER not conditioning — stop the moment speed drops. Astro zone.

days.label: Day 2 — Fight
days.focus: Class / bag / sparring — log freely in notes

days.label: Day 3 — S&C: Push + Vertical Pull
days.focus: Overhead strength, vertical pull, shoulder health

items.name: Weighted Pull-Up (DB between feet)
items.cue: Hold a DB between the ankles for load — no dip belt at this gym yet. Full dead-hang to chin-over. Swap to plate-loaded lat pulldown if the DB is fiddly.

items.name: Barbell Overhead Press
items.cue: Brace hard, glutes tight, press to a stacked lockout. Your OHP has the most headroom of any lift.

items.name: Incline DB Press
items.cue: Controlled descent, full stretch. Balances the vertical pressing and keeps the shoulders healthy.

items.name: Cable Face Pull
items.cue: High elbows, pull to eye level, pause. The best insurance for striker shoulders — never skip it.

days.label: Day 4 — Fight
days.focus: Class / bag / sparring — log freely in notes

days.label: Day 5 — S&C: Pull + Power + Core
days.focus: Horizontal pull, linear power, anti-rotation trunk

items.name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
items.cue: Flat back, pull to the sternum, explosive concentric. Balances all your pressing; clinch and posture strength.

items.name: Reverse Lunge (DB)
items.cue: Step back under control, drive through the front heel. Athletic single-leg strength — different stimulus from Day 1's Bulgarians.

items.name: Slam Ball (astro)
items.cue: Full overhead reach to a violent floor slam. Quality reps only, reset and breathe between each. Astro zone.

items.name: Pallof Press (cable)
items.cue: Resist the rotation, don't create it. Transfers to punch power and protects the spine better than crunches.

days.label: Day 6 — Fight
days.focus: Class / bag / sparring — log freely in notes

days.label: Day 7 — Pick / Recovery
days.focus: Your choice: recovery-studio session (cryo / infrared sauna / plunge), a yoga or mobility class, or a bonus session. Log what you did.
